raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box (box_1) is resting on top of box_2 with its left and right faces fully exposed. There is at least 10 cm of free space on both lateral sides to accommodate the robot’s end-effectors and enough vertical clearance above the stack to lift the box without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and has been lifted a few centimeters above box_2, leaving box_2 on the tabletop while the robot maintains control of box_1."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box (box_1) is resting on top of box_2 with its left and right faces fully exposed. There is at least 10 cm of free space on both lateral sides to accommodate the robot’s end-effectors and enough vertical clearance above the stack to lift the box without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and has been lifted a few centimeters above box_2, leaving box_2 on the tabletop while the robot maintains control of box_1.
